name: skill-architect-brainstorm
description: Pre-design brainstorm agent for the skill-architect suite

mode.description: Brainstorm mode. Auto-detected from other parameters if not provided.

skill_path.description: Path to an existing skill directory. Triggers standalone mode.

caller.description: Name of the calling skill (skill-architect, skill-architect-update, skill-architect-multy-plan). Triggers intent mode.

keep_file.description: If true, the brainstorm .md result file is not deleted after the session.
